title: Verify Remind Me toggle sends WhatsApp notification 24hrs before trial ends
description: Test that when user enables 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle, system schedules a WhatsApp notification
preconditions: User has active trial with remaining days
User is in Trial Corner Manage Trial section

steps.description: 2. Click on 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle
3. Verify toggle changes to enabled state

expected_result: Toggle is enabled, micro-copy displays 'We will send a WhatsApp/Push notification so you can decide then. No accidental charges.'
